channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 66A: Rescue operation
item.description: Line 66A: Irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: rescue operation. [On 21.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Line 66A: Irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: rescue operation.
[On 21.05.2026]

item.title: 31: Rescue operation from Klosterneuburger Straße, Wallensteinstraße
item.description: Line 31: Operation only between Stammersdorf and Klosterneuburger Straße, Wallensteinstraße. Continue to Wallensteinplatz. [On 21.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Line 31: Operation only between Stammersdorf and Klosterneuburger Straße, Wallensteinstraße. Continue to Wallensteinplatz.
[On 21.05.2026]

item.title: 73A: Foreign traffic accident
item.description: Line 73A: Disability in the direction of Simmering S U. Estimated duration: 18:15 clock. Reason: Foreign traffic accident in the Zinnergasse area. [On 21.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Line 73A: Disability in the direction of Simmering S U. Estimated duration: 18:15 clock. Reason: Foreign traffic accident in the Zinnergasse area.
[On 21.05.2026]

item.title: 59A: Traffic congestion
item.description: Line 59A: Irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic overload. [On 21.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Line 59A: Irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: traffic overload.
[On 21.05.2026]

item.title: 6: Harmful vehicle
item.description: Line 6: After a driving disability, there are different intervals. [On 21.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Line 6: After a driving disability, there are different intervals.
[On 21.05.2026]

item.title: 18: Harmful vehicle
item.description: Line 18: After a driving disability, there are different intervals. [On 21.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Line 18: After a driving disability, there are different intervals.

item.title: 71: Foreign traffic accident
item.description: Line 71: After a driving disability, there are different intervals. [On 21.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:

[On 21.05.2026]

item.title: 11A/26A/94A: traffic congestion
item.description: Line 11A: Irregular intervals in both directions. Line 26A: Irregular intervals in both directions. [On 21.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Line 11A: Irregular intervals in both directions. Line 26A: Irregular intervals in both directions.
[On 21.05.2026]

item.title: 37A: Construction works
item.description: Due to construction work in the Donaueschingenstraße area, the line 37A is diverted. [Since 21.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction work in the Donaueschingenstraße area, the line 37A is diverted.
[Since 21.05.2026]
